title: Deathswap
description: Every few Minutes or so you will swap positions with the other players, Last one alive wins
body:
**This is a 100% Vanilla Deathswap Datapack**

_Game:_
- Every few Minutes or so you will swap positions with the other players, Last one alive wins

_About:_
- This was made only by a Datapack
- This is **100% vanilla** **1.21.8** (might work in lower versions)
- It supports up to **2.147 Billion** Players.

_Credits:_
- By **Sammy3D**
- Join **Openvoxel Studios** Discord Server for more Datapacks and Maps

_Crediting:_
- Make Sure to Credit me if you use this Datapack in a video or use it in any way that is not private.
- Also you cannot republish this datapack even if you credit me or modify it without my permission.

_Extra:_
- Do ``` /trigger Deathswap ``` to use the datapack (only operators can use it)
- Also this Datapack will **Destroy**(will kill @e, change border, etc...) your Minecraft world, so **DO NOT** use it on any valuable worlds, use it only on a new world to play
- If you find any bugs or issues with the Datapack, join the Openvoxel Studios Discord Server and report it :)
